title: Sakana: Fable 5 Intelligence WITHOUT Fable 5!
summary: Sakana released Fugu, a multi-agent orchestration system with a standard and higher-end "Fugu Ultra" variant that uses panel-style synthesis of multiple model responses. The system is accessible via a single model API and reportedly matches frontier models like Claude and others on benchmarks.
writeup: The video covers Sakana's release of Fugu, a multi-agent orchestration system offered in a standard version and a higher-end "Fugu Ultra" variant that synthesizes multiple model responses through a panel-style approach. It matters because the system is accessible through a single model API and reportedly matches frontier models such as Claude on benchmarks, suggesting orchestration across smaller models as an alternative to relying on a single large model. The key takeaways: Fugu combines agent orchestration with test-time compute, and the Ultra variant's panel synthesis aims for frontier-level results without a single frontier-scale model.
